title: Kth Largest Element in a Stream
input_format: A stream of numbers added continuously using an `add` method.
output_format: The `k`th largest element in the stream.
constraints:
- `1 <= k <= 10^4`
- `0 <= nums.length <= 10^4`
- `-10^4 <= nums[i] <= 10^4`
- `-10^4 <= val <= 10^4`
- At most `10^4` calls will be made to `add`.
- It is guaranteed that there will be at least `k` elements in the array when you search for the `k`th element.
function_signature: class KthLargest { constructor(k: number, nums: number[]) {} add(val: number): number {} }
